title: CertificateInfo
description: Details about the installed certificate, including the raw certificate data, without the private key.

common_name.description: Common Name on the TLS certificate.

subject_alternative_names.description: Subject Alternative Names for which the certificate is also valid.

validity_not_before.description: When does the validity period of this certificate begin? RFC 3339.

validity_not_after.description: When does the validity period of this certificate end? If this date is in the past, the certificate has expired. RFC 3339.

signing_algorithm.description: Signing algorithm used to sign the certificate.

certificate.description: The primary certificate, as a string.

intermediate_certificates.description: The intermediate certificate(s), as a string.
